name: Chocolate Bar Poundcake
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, melt chocolate in syrup, stirring occasionally.
2. Cool to lukewarm.
3. Cream butter and margarine with sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs, 1 at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla.
6. Sift flour and baking soda together.
7. Add the dry ingredients alternately with buttermilk to the creamed mixture, beating well after each addition.
8. Whip the chocolate syrup mixture with a large spoon until smooth.
9. Add the chocolate syrup mixture to the creamed mixture.
10. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch angel food cake pan.
11. Let sit at room temperature for one hour for better texture.
12. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
13. Test with a toothpick to ensure done.
14. Cool completely.
15. Turn out onto a plate.
16. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
